title: Switch Nutrition Pty Ltd — Consumer harm
investigation_objective: The Therapeutic Goods Administration issued Switch Nutrition Pty Ltd four infringement notices totalling $79,200, announced late April 2026, over alleged unlawful advertising of products containing Nicotinamide Mononucleotide and Vitamin D3 claiming to treat serious medical conditions - a prohibited representation under the Therapeutic Goods Act and Advertising Code.
scope: Paid $79,200 over four TGA infringement notices for alleged unlawful advertising claiming products could treat serious medical conditions
